response.justification: Candidate is a seasoned senior engineer with strong breadth across web, mobile, and embedded systems, plus genuine tooling/IDE-adjacent work (NI LabWindows/CVI, MCP code generators, custom test runners). However, the role demands deep Java/Kotlin/Spring/JVM expertise, which is largely absent from the resume. Java appears only as a peripheral skill alongside DLang on robotic-arm and orchestration projects years ago, with no Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or Kotlin experience demonstrated. The candidate's recent focus is TypeScript/Node and AI tooling, not JVM internals.
strengths: Genuine IDE/dev-tooling background (NI LabWindows/CVI in C/C++, custom test runners, MCP code generators)
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, pairing, trunk-based development, workshops and talks
Proven track record on complex, large-scale systems (Sociomantic low-latency microservices)
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Kotlin is not mentioned anywhere on the resume
Java exposure is shallow and dated; primary stack is TypeScript/Node and DLang
